content.full_text:
July 15, 1991

Ms. Blanca M. Breeze
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Breeze:

We were recently in contact with your office regarding whether or not members of the Los Angeles Unified School District Annuity Reserve Fund Board were subject to the disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act (Your File No. I-91-227). Prior to our request for assistance and the receipt of your response, the public member of the Annuity Reserve Fund Board resigned, effective in October 1990. Is the public member required to file the Leaving Office Statement of Commission Form 721 Statement of Economic Interests inasmuch as he resigned prior to the time we commenced requiring the filing of the forms?

Your advice in this matter would be appreciated.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Robert Booker
Chief Business and Financial Officer

RB:vj1

c: Mr. Apperson
